contracts.contract: Caf session and turn receipt writer
contracts.notes: Validates env-owned receipt paths, successor/predecessor metadata, deterministic pretty JSON, no-op behavior, overwrite behavior, and unsupported source rejection.

contracts.contract: Caf effort, wake, and unsupported mode directory bridge
contracts.notes: Validates request scanning, accepted effort aliases, consumed wake receipts, refused mode receipts, malformed effort refusal, unknown schema skips, and idempotent duplicate scans.

contracts.contract: Minimal Caf goal DTO, state, and tool flow
contracts.notes: Validates app/server goal JSON, in-memory lifecycle transitions, token usage accounting, model-facing goal tools, and explicit unsupported tool/status behavior.

contracts.contract: Caf goal-apply request and receipt bridge
contracts.notes: Validates Caf/Ralph goal-apply request parsing, Brew completion authority guards, ThreadGoalStore application, clear-boundary receipts, invalid request refusal, and idempotent duplicate scans.

contracts.contract: Wake/restart successor and predecessor continuity metadata
contracts.notes: Validates explicit successor/predecessor parsing, resume/fresh continuity derivation, receipt writes from parsed metadata, and invalid metadata rejection.

unsupportedFailures.reason: The full Cafetera Codex module contract runner is not yet pointed at a production hxrust binary.
unsupportedFailures.next: Keep this report limited to the selected fixture-backed subset until the runtime adapter is executable from Cafetera.

unsupportedFailures.reason: The subset checks receipts and bridge files but does not replace the native Codex TUI event loop.
unsupportedFailures.next: Wire app events and terminal/runtime behavior in later Cafex adapter milestones.

unsupportedFailures.reason: Continuity metadata is parsed and written, but no fork/exec or process handoff is performed by hxrust.
unsupportedFailures.next: Treat restart proof as metadata-level compatibility only.

unsupportedFailures.reason: Mode-apply requests are classified and refused; a live runtime mode transition is not implemented.
unsupportedFailures.next: Preserve fail-closed behavior until a generic runtime mode surface exists.

unsupportedFailures.reason: The contract subset uses credential-free fixtures and mock stream handling, not a live networked model provider.
unsupportedFailures.next: Keep secrets and model credentials outside fixture gates.
